notableFixes: added shared helpers to reconcile persisted snapshots on reopen and to emit a host-owned close completion payload
kept stale persisted weather visible when a reopen refresh degrades and the host cache is cold
added an explicit close control that records app.complete and preserves the last validated weather snapshot for later chat turns
recorded weather-specific app-event observability for stale fallback and close completion acceptance
greenCommand: source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && pnpm vitest run src/shared/chatbridge/apps/weather-dashboard.test.ts src/renderer/components/chatbridge/apps/weather/WeatherDashboardPanel.test.tsx src/renderer/components/chatbridge/apps/ReviewedAppLaunchSurface.test.tsx test/integration/chatbridge/scenarios/weather-dashboard-flagship.test.ts
